function.outcome_justification: Two purchase records matched vendor 深圳市海云电子 and item relay modules: 50_finance/purchases/2025_12_05__eur_000044__bill__house_mesh_esp32_order.md shows relay modules line_eur 12, and 50_finance/purchases/2026_03_07__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md shows relay modules line_eur 6. Using context date 2026-03-31, '76 days ago' anchors to 2026-01-14; the 2025-12-05 record is closer to that date than 2026-03-07, so 12 is the correct selected amount.
